metadata.description: Agent Skills for Longbridge securities — 13 consolidated skills covering market data, technical analysis, derivatives, fundamentals, research, portfolio, quant strategies, watchlist, content, market intelligence, earnings, and value investing. HK / US / A-share (SH/SZ) / Singapore markets. Trilingual (Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English).

plugins.name: longbridge
plugins.description: Longbridge securities skill family (v2): 13 consolidated skills replacing the previous 127-skill set. Full coverage of market data, fundamentals, research, portfolio & account, quantitative strategies, and more. Requires reinstall (not just update) when upgrading from v1.x — see scripts/reinstall.sh.
